features.description: Repo contains grounded product, architecture, data-model, diagram, and task docs for the route-based rebuild
steps: Open the PRD and verify the single-stream URI rule is defined
Open the architecture note and verify app, route, source, and session boundaries are documented
Open the data-model note and verify app_routes and app_sources are defined
Open the diagram and verify the runtime relationship is documented
Open the task list and verify the implementation order is documented

features.description: Backend persists apps and lists them after backend restart
steps: Create an app through the REST API
Verify the app appears in GET /api/apps
Restart the backend with the same database
Verify the app still appears in GET /api/apps

features.description: App can declare a purpose route named yolov5 with a video expectation
steps: Create an app
Create a route named yolov5 with media expectation video
List routes for the app
Verify yolov5 appears with the declared expectation

features.description: App can declare a second purpose route named yolov8 with a video expectation
steps: Create an app
Create a route named yolov8 with media expectation video
List routes for the app
Verify yolov8 appears with the declared expectation

features.description: App can declare a route named scene-color with a video expectation
steps: Create an app
Create a route named scene-color with media expectation video
List routes for the app
Verify scene-color appears with the declared expectation

features.description: App can declare a route named scene-depth with a depth expectation
steps: Create an app
Create a route named scene-depth with media expectation depth and optional dependency metadata
List routes for the app
Verify scene-depth appears with the declared expectation

features.description: User can pick a listed canonical URI knowing that each URI represents exactly one stream
steps: Open the frontend or device catalog API
Inspect listed URI entries
Verify each listed URI corresponds to one stream
Verify color and depth are represented by separate URI entries if both exist

features.description: Injecting a video URI with route yolov5 routes callbacks to the app
steps: Create an app and declare route yolov5
Inject a compatible video URI with route yolov5
Verify the backend creates a logical session
Verify the SDK receives route-scoped callbacks

features.description: Injecting a second video URI with route yolov8 routes independent callbacks to the app
steps: Create an app and declare route yolov8
Inject a compatible video URI with route yolov8
Verify a second source is attached independently
Verify the SDK receives route-scoped callbacks for yolov8

features.description: Injecting a selected grouped-source URI with route scene-color routes callbacks
steps: Create an app and declare route scene-color
Inject a compatible URI such as insightos://host/desk-rgbd/480p_30?source=color with route scene-color
Verify the backend records the resolved source stream
Verify the SDK receives route-scoped callbacks

features.description: Injecting a selected grouped-source URI with route scene-depth routes callbacks
steps: Create an app and declare route scene-depth
Inject a compatible URI such as insightos://host/desk-rgbd/480p_30?source=depth with route scene-depth
Verify the backend records the resolved source stream
Verify the SDK receives route-scoped callbacks

features.description: Source connection rejects requests with a missing or unknown route
steps: Create an app
Attempt to connect a source without route
Verify the API rejects the request
Attempt to connect a source with an unknown route
Verify the API rejects the request

features.description: Source connection rejects a URI whose resolved source metadata does not satisfy the route expectation
steps: Create an app and declare a route with a depth expectation
Inject a normal video URI into that route
Verify the backend rejects the request with a compatibility error

features.description: Apps, routes, and sources survive backend restart while runtime state is normalized to stopped
steps: Create an app, route, and source
Restart the backend with the same database
List the app sources
Verify the source is still present and its state is stopped

features.description: Explicitly restarting a persisted source creates a fresh runtime session
steps: Create an app, route, and source
Restart the backend with the same database
Call source start on the persisted source
Verify a fresh runtime session is created

features.description: Browser UI supports create-route-connect-start-stop flow end to end
steps: Open the frontend
Create an app
Create a route
Connect a listed URI to that route
Start the source
Stop the source
Verify status updates are visible in the UI
